name: open-design
description: Open Design — local-first design app exposed to coding agents as workflow skills + MCP. Install once with your agent's plugin command and design generation, projects/files/previews are reachable through the local `od` daemon.

plugins.name: open-design
plugins.description: Open Design agent plugin: workflow skills (create → preview → verify → export) plus the stdio MCP server. 139 design skills + 150 DESIGN.md systems served by your local `od` daemon. Requires `od` on PATH (brew / npm / DMG).
